title: Requests for Quotation
description: Raise a quotation request, watch supplier responses arrive, and compare them.

steps.title: Your requests
steps.description: Each RFQ carries its targeted suppliers and status.
steps.voiceScript: Each request shows the suppliers it went to and where it stands.
steps.captionText: Each request shows the suppliers it went to and where it stands.
steps.fallbackMessage: Your requests: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Raise a new RFQ
steps.voiceScript: Let us raise a new request for quotation.
steps.captionText: Let us raise a new request for quotation.
steps.fallbackMessage: Raise a new RFQ: the next screen is not reachable from here.

steps.title: Choose suppliers
steps.description: An RFQ with no targets is rejected.
steps.voiceScript: Choose the suppliers who should quote. An RFQ needs at least one.
steps.captionText: Choose the suppliers who should quote. An RFQ needs at least one.
steps.fallbackMessage: Choose suppliers: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Send it
steps.description: Suppliers are emailed and respond in their portal.
steps.voiceScript: Send it. Suppliers are notified and respond in their own portal.
steps.captionText: Send it. Suppliers are notified and respond in their own portal.
steps.fallbackMessage: Send it: not visible on this screen yet.
